name: HubSpot
description: Manage contacts in HubSpot CRM via the v3 API
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The HubSpot CRM action to perform.

email.label: Email
email.description: Contact email address. Used by: Create Contact.

firstName.label: First Name
firstName.description: Contact first name. Used by: Create Contact.

lastName.label: Last Name
lastName.description: Contact last name. Used by: Create Contact.

contactId.label: Contact ID
contactId.description: HubSpot contact ID. Used by: Get Contact, Update Contact.

properties.label: Properties
properties.description: Contact properties object. Used by: Update Contact.

query.label: Query
query.description: Search query string. Used by: Search Contacts.

searchFilters.label: Search Filters
searchFilters.description: Filter groups for advanced search. Used by: Search Contacts.
